name: curb-appeal
description: Build production-ready, conversion-focused salon and local-business websites through a deterministic, non-technical workflow.

interface.longDescription: A salon-first workflow for project detection, strategy, visual direction, copy, implementation, booking, SEO, accessibility, responsive behavior, and verified QA.
interface.defaultPrompt: Build a premium, responsive, conversion-focused website for this local business using the existing codebase and the Curb Appeal workflow.
